CREATE TABLE moods (mood_name VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY, mood_value INT);
SELECT mood_name FROM moods WHERE enum_code(mood_name::mood) = 1;
SELECT enum_code(mood_name::mood) FROM moods WHERE mood_value IN (SELECT mood_value FROM moods WHERE mood_value < 3);
CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_mood VARCHAR);
SELECT u.user_id, u.user_mood, enum_code(u.user_mood::mood) AS mood_code FROM users u WHERE enum_code(u.user_mood::mood) > 1;
WITH mood_codes AS (SELECT mood_name, enum_code(mood_name::mood) AS code FROM moods) SELECT * FROM mood_codes WHERE code IN (SELECT code FROM mood_codes WHERE code > 1);
SELECT u.user_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE user_mood::mood = 'happy') AS happy_count, enum_code(u.user_mood::mood) AS mood_code FROM users u WHERE enum_code(u.user_mood::mood) = 2;
CREATE TABLE interactions (interaction_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, mood VARCHAR);
SELECT ins.interaction_id, enum_code(ins.mood::mood) AS mood_value FROM interactions ins JOIN users u ON ins.user_id = u.user_id WHERE enum_code(u.user_mood::mood) < 3;
